name: Charlotte Katakuri
effect: [When Attacking]/[On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −1: Look at 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck. Then, this Leader gains +1000 power during this battle.

name: Charlotte Cracker
effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Big Mom Pirates} type, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.

name: Charlotte Katakuri
effect: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, if your Leader has the {Big Mom Pirates} type, add up to 2 DON!! cards from your DON!! deck and rest them. [On K.O.] Play up to 1 Character card with 8000 power or less from your hand.

name: Charlotte Brulee
effect: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Big Mom Pirates} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Charlotte Linlin
effect: [On Play] DON!! −4, you may trash 1 card from your hand: Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. Then, up to 1 of your opponent's Characters' base power becomes 0 during this turn.

name: Baron Tamago & Pekoms
effect: [When Attacking] DON!! −1: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 2000 base power or less.
